scripts.dev-container: nodemon --exec "npm run build && docker compose -f dev-compose.yml up --build"
scripts.dev-local: nodemon --exec "npx acts-util-apilib && tsc; nodemon --exec '(dotenv -e .env -- && cd dist && SCRIPTDIR=../scripts node main.js)' --watch '../../OpenArabicMusicDB/builder/dist/db.json'"
